problem: Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics
mechanism: Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power
hypothesis: Combining Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 2 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
